'''鈭歜-ng-w''' ('''kabangaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jumboize|jumboize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jumboize|jumboize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-ng-w
|-
! Lemma
| kabangaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibangaw|thibangaw]] || [[word:jibangaw|jibangaw]] || [[word:shibangaw|shibangaw]] || [[word:kibangaw|kibangaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubangaw|thuthubangaw]] || [[word:jujubangaw|jujubangaw]] || [[word:shushubangaw|shushubangaw]] || [[word:kukubangaw|kukubangaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubangaw|thubangaw]] || [[word:jubangaw|jubangaw]] || [[word:shubangaw|shubangaw]] || [[word:kubangaw|kubangaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubangaw|thubangaw]] || [[word:jubangaw|jubangaw]] || [[word:shubangaw|shubangaw]] || [[word:kubangaw|kubangaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebangaw|thebangaw]] || [[word:jebangaw|jebangaw]] || [[word:shebangaw|shebangaw]] || [[word:kebangaw|kebangaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobangaw|thothobangaw]] || [[word:jojobangaw|jojobangaw]] || [[word:shoshobangaw|shoshobangaw]] || [[word:kokobangaw|kokobangaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobangaw|thobangaw]] || [[word:jobangaw|jobangaw]] || [[word:shobangaw|shobangaw]] || [[word:kobangaw|kobangaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobangaw|thobangaw]] || [[word:jobangaw|jobangaw]] || [[word:shobangaw|shobangaw]] || [[word:kobangaw|kobangaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]] || [[word:bangaw|bangaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bangaw|th忙bangaw]] || [[word:j忙bangaw|j忙bangaw]] || [[word:sh忙bangaw|sh忙bangaw]] || [[word:k忙bangaw|k忙bangaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabangaw|thathabangaw]] || [[word:jajabangaw|jajabangaw]] || [[word:shashabangaw|shashabangaw]] || [[word:kakabangaw|kakabangaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabangaw|thabangaw]] || [[word:jabangaw|jabangaw]] || [[word:shabangaw|shabangaw]] || [[word:kabangaw|kabangaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabangaw|thabangaw]] || [[word:jabangaw|jabangaw]] || [[word:shabangaw|shabangaw]] || [[word:kabangaw|kabangaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabangaw|shabangaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabangaw|goshabangaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabangaw|gokishabangaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabangawn眉|shabangawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabangawnkn眉|goshabangawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangawn眉|gokishabangawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabangawsh毛|shabangawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabangawnksh毛|goshabangawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabangawsh毛|gokishabangawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangawro|shabangawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangawnkro|goshabangawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangawro|gokishabangawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangawmu|shabangawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangawnkmu|goshabangawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangawmu|gokishabangawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabangawsher|shabangawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabangawnksher|goshabangawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabangawsher|gokishabangawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabangawng|shabangawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabangawnkng|goshabangawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabangawng|gokishabangawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabangawya|shabangawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabangawnkya|goshabangawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabangawya|gokishabangawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabangawyam|shabangawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabangawnkyam|goshabangawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabangawyam|gokishabangawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangawn眉sh毛|shabangawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangawnkn眉sh毛|goshabangawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangawn眉sh毛|gokishabangawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangawn眉ro|shabangawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangawnkn眉ro|goshabangawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangawn眉ro|gokishabangawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangawn眉mu|shabangawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangawnkn眉mu|goshabangawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangawn眉mu|gokishabangawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangawsh毛n眉|shabangawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangawnksh毛n眉|goshabangawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangawsh毛n眉|gokishabangawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangawsh毛ro|shabangawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangawnksh毛ro|goshabangawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangawsh毛ro|gokishabangawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangawsh毛mu|shabangawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangawnksh毛mu|goshabangawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangawsh毛mu|gokishabangawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangawron眉|shabangawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangawnkron眉|goshabangawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangawron眉|gokishabangawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangawrosh毛|shabangawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangawnkrosh毛|goshabangawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangawrosh毛|gokishabangawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabangawromu|shabangawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabangawnkromu|goshabangawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabangawromu|gokishabangawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabangawmun眉|shabangawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabangawnkmun眉|goshabangawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabangawmun眉|gokishabangawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabangawmush毛|shabangawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabangawnkmush毛|goshabangawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabangawmush毛|gokishabangawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabangawmuro|shabangawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabangawnkmuro|goshabangawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabangawmuro|gokishabangawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
